summary: Iteration 9 — Frontend-only testing of the new per-channel description/purpose feature. Verified channel strip description input, SelectedChannelPanel description input, ChannelPills second-line description, bidirectional sync, localStorage persistence across reload, read-only LOCK mode regression, and core regressions (name edit, mute, EQ modal). All 8 review items PASS.
critical_code_review_comments: ChannelStrip.jsx, SelectedChannelPanel.jsx and ChannelPills.jsx are clean and small; no DRY violations introduced by this feature.
Migration logic in dspStore.loadFromStorage correctly defaults description to '' for both inputs and outputs (verified via fresh localStorage and via existing-state scenarios).
The stopPropagation on the strip description onClick handler properly prevents the parent header's onSelect from firing — verified empirically.
Inert-based lock works for the new inputs (the parent is inert, so even Playwright keyboard typing is blocked).
Minor (non-blocking): the strip's description placeholder uses a Unicode ellipsis '…' (Purpose…) — matches spec exactly.
Minor (non-blocking): pill-{id}-desc element correctly omitted when description is empty (verified pill-out_phy_3-desc absent).
test_credentials: n/a — no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: Set descriptions: OUT 1 = 'Lead Vocal', OUT 3 = 'Subwoofer L', VOUT 0 = 'Sala Cinema'. These are now in localStorage key dsp_state_v1. The second run reset OUT 1 back to 'OUT 1' name after regression test but description was left as 'Lead Vocal v2' on the strip. Main agent may want to clear localStorage in dev before screenshots.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 description feature fully verified. Lock toggle testid is `readonly-toggle` (not `lock-toggle`). Pill testids follow pattern `pill-{output.id}` and `pill-{output.id}-desc`. The pill-desc element is only present when description is non-empty (conditional render). Migration in dspStore.loadFromStorage handles older localStorage states correctly. All previous iteration flows remain working (name rename, mute, EQ modal verified). No regressions found.

results_detail.channel_strip_description_typing: PASS — out-out_phy-0-description accepts text 'Lead Vocal'; placeholder='Purpose…', maxLength=32
results_detail.no_auto_select_on_description_click: PASS — stopPropagation works; clicking description does not select the channel into the panel
results_detail.sel_channel_description_sync_to_pill: PASS — typing 'Subwoofer L' in sel-channel-description updates pill-out_phy_2-desc
results_detail.bidirectional_sync_strip_to_pill: PASS — typing in out-out_phy-0-description updates pill-out_phy_0-desc
results_detail.pills_no_desc_element_when_empty: PASS — pill-out_phy_3-desc absent when description is empty
results_detail.persistence_after_reload: PASS — OUT 1='Lead Vocal', OUT 3='Subwoofer L', VOUT 0='Sala Cinema' all persisted
results_detail.lock_mode_blocks_editing: PASS — parent is inert; typing under LOCK does not change strip nor sel-channel-description
results_detail.edit_restored_after_unlock: PASS — value 'Lead Vocal v2' written after unlock
results_detail.regression_eq_modal: PASS — out-out_phy-0-open-eq opens parametric EQ modal
